task_completion.description: Log into the SEB Server web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the SEB Server dashboard or interface at localhost:8080, indicating successful login (e.g., user profile or logout button visible).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Exam Templates section and open the creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the 'Exam Templates' page with an 'Add' or 'Create' form opened.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified template name and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text fields in the template creation form filled with Name: 'Midterm Proctored Exam Template' and Description: 'Standard template for proctored midterm examinations with monitoring indicators'.

task_completion.description: Add a monitoring indicator of type 'Last Ping Time'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A monitoring indicator section or dialog where the type 'Last Ping Time' is selected from a dropdown or list.

task_completion.description: Configure the indicator name and thresholds
task_completion.visual_evidence: Indicator configuration showing Name: 'Connection Quality', Warning threshold: 2000, and Danger threshold: 5000.
A success message indicating the template was saved, or the 'Midterm Proctored Exam Template' appearing in the list of existing exam templates.

integrity.description: The agent used the SEB Server web GUI to create the template
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser at localhost:8080, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to insert the template
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands or database client tools being used to bypass the web interface.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of typing into forms, opening dropdowns, and clicking buttons, rather than just a final success screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use the SEB Server web UI to create an exam template. Target Name: 'Midterm Proctored Exam Template'. Target Description: 'Standard template for proctored midterm examinations with monitoring indicators'. It must include a monitoring indicator of type 'Last Ping Time', named 'Connection Quality', with a warning threshold of 2000 and a danger threshold of 5000. Verify these exact values are entered into the web forms.
